overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban environment in Night City. The player navigates from a sunlit street corner, crosses a road, explores a hotel courtyard with palm trees, enters a dimly lit interior with NPCs, and ascends to an upper walkway. The scene features bright daylight, holographic advertisements, cyberpunk architecture, and neon signage.

events.description: large green holographic advertisement becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching an intersection with traffic lights

concrete commercial building with purple trim and FLO signage
tall glass and steel tower with red structural elements
elevated highway structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk next to a commercial building with purple trim. The camera approaches a traffic light pole at an intersection, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background and sparse vehicle traffic on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under hotel entrance

events.description: crossing the street from sidewalk to the hotel entrance area
passing under the large orange overhead hotel structure with Japanese signage

floating green holographic display showing a human figure
tall red and white striped smokestack visible in the distance
low-rise building with closed metal garage doors and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the street and enters a covered walkway beneath a large orange hotel structure with Japanese signage. A holographic advertisement floats in the air ahead, and the environment transitions from open street to a semi-enclosed arcade with concrete buildings on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hotel courtyard with palm trees and parked vehicle

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the sunlit hotel courtyard
approaching the hotel building entrance and stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunny courtyard toward the hotel entrance

entered.detail: two-story motel-style building with green trim and multiple balconies
red and white futuristic sports car parked in the courtyard center
tall palm trees scattered throughout the courtyard
red automated vending machine near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a bright open courtyard surrounded by two-story hotel buildings with green trim. A futuristic red sports car sits parked in the center, and palm trees cast shadows across the paved ground. The camera moves toward a dark entrance at the far end of the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit hotel interior with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering dark interior from bright sunlight outside
beginning to ascend the graffiti-covered stairwell

agents.ego_description: entering the dark hotel interior, passing NPCs, and climbing the stairs

notable_agents.action: woman with pink and blue hair standing against the wall looking at phone
man in orange patterned jacket drinking near a makeshift cardboard table

entered.detail: dark stairwell entrance with concrete steps leading upward
walls covered in colorful spray paint and tags
red vending machine with illuminated display inside the dark lobby
scattered cardboard boxes and trash on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dimly lit hotel interior from the bright courtyard, revealing graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. Two NPCs are visible inside - one with colorful hair against the wall and another drinking near a makeshift table. The camera proceeds toward and begins ascending a concrete stairwell.

events.description: emerging from dark stairwell to sunlit upper walkway
exiting interior to exterior balcony with view of courtyard below

agents.ego_description: exiting the stairwell onto the upper walkway and looking down at the courtyard

notable_agents.action: person leaning on the railing looking down at the courtyard below

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the upper level walkway
view looking down into the hotel courtyard from above

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dark stairwell onto an upper walkway bathed in sunlight, with a metal railing overlooking the courtyard below. The hotel building and palm trees are now visible from an elevated perspective, and an NPC leans against the railing looking down at the parked car and courtyard floor below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open city intersection into the shadowed depths of a hotel before ascending back into the sunlight. It begins on a sunlit urban sidewalk beside a purple-trimmed building, moving toward a traffic light as futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distance. As the camera crosses the street, the environment shifts from the open road into a semi-enclosed arcade beneath a large orange hotel structure featuring Japanese signage and floating holographic advertisements. The scene then opens into a bright courtyard with palm trees and a parked red sports car before the camera plunges into a dimly lit interior filled with graffiti, debris, and lounging NPCs. Finally, the movement leads up a concrete stairwell and emerges onto an elevated metal walkway, revealing a high-angle view of the courtyard and the hotel architecture under the clear daylight.
